previewItems.biography:
🌻 The Home of Styling, Organising + Cleaning
📖 Bestselling Author ‘The Dream Clean’ + ‘The Fair Share’ 
💕 Mum of 2
📧 genevieve@daymgmt.com.au

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
It was so much fun chatting with the @sunriseon7 team today about my top home hacks to help save you time and money! I truely believe having a beautiful home to come back to after a long day is the ultimate source of self-care, and it makes me so happy that I’m able to share that joy ♥️ a beautiful home doesn’t need to cost the world - it could be as simple as softening your linen to get a better nights sleep, or decluttering your kitchen counter to help you feel more organised. 

During 2020 lockdown, I started sharing inexpensive tips + tricks that I was doing around our home to make it a more beautiful space. At that time the home was a workplace, a school, a kinder and it was so hard to relax at the end of the day in that chaotic space. So I started sharing simple, inexpensive ways to make the home more beautiful. 

I could never imagine that my side-passion would turn into a full time gig and I’m so grateful to each and every one of you for helping that passion come to life ♥️

I’d love to know which tip has been your favourite so far? Let me know below xx 

#homehacks #hometips #cleaninghacks #cleanhome #cleaningmotivation #cleaning #homesweethome #homeinspiration #homeinspo #diycleaning

latestIgtvVideos.title: DIY Dust Mite Spray 🌿
latestIgtvVideos.caption: My first IGTV ✨ This DIY spray helps control dust mite allergens around my home, only takes a few minutes to make and smells so lovely too thanks to @ecomodernessentials oils 🌿 let me know if you try it x

latestPosts.caption:
THE FAIR SHARE IS OUT NOW 🥹🎉 I’m sooo excited to announce that my newest book The Fair Share officially releases today! You can find it in @bigwaustralia and all good bookstores near you 🩷

So much love, time and energy has gone into every page of this book, and I can’t wait to see it in your hands. The Fair Share helps you rewrite your home routines to make them more fair and balanced, along with all of my top home cleaning tips and tricks in one place! It’s literally your home cleaning and organising bible! Thank you for being here and supporting me - this book wouldn’t exist without you 🫶

#hometips #homehacks #cleaningtips #cleaninghacks #mamamilastips

You’ll never see another spider web in your home with tip #5 🙌 save this video for your next home deep clean! As we enter the warmer months and open up our doors + windows, these tricks will make sure the bugs and spiders stay outside where they belong and not inside your home ♥️ hope these tips are helpful lovelies xx 
1. Spiders hate citrus and rosemary, so place lemon and rosemary in boiling water and allow this fragrance to fill your home (it smells great too!)
2. Once cool, you can bottle this mix and use it as a surface spray on doors and windowsills (use discretion if you have pets)
3. Place bay leaves in your pantry to keep pantry bugs away 
4. Pour boiling water down drains to prevent fruit flies entering 
5. And wipe peppermint oil on ceilings to prevent spider webs! This one works so well to prevent spiders and spider webs in the corners of your home 

Slippers and duster from @kmartaus 

Which one will you try first? 

#homehacks #hometips #tipsandtricks #cleanstagram #cleaninginstagram #cleaninghacks #cleaningtips

This week I shared my Mama Mila journey and some of my favourite home hacks with @theheraldsun (and had my first mag cover which I’m still crying over!) 💕 Swipe to read a little snippet of my book The Dream Clean 👀 

A few years ago when we were confined to our homes during lockdown, I started sharing videos of the little things I was doing each day to make my home feel like a more peaceful space. Little 5 minute tasks like rolling your towels, or deodorising your mattress (does anyone remember those first videos?). After reading your incredible comments and messages about how much you appreciated the tips and how much they changed your day-to-day lives, I took the leap into creating these videos full time! 

Majority of the content I post on this page is requests from my DMs and comments, so please keep your requests coming ♥️ my new book The Dream Clean was also inspired by you and your comments! The first thing I did before I started writing, was spend weeks going through every comment and DM - writing down your questions and organising the tips and tricks room by room and by cleaning level - quick, medium, deep. So thank you for shaping The Dream Clean to be what it is - the book has a piece of all of you in it, and when flicking through it you may just be able to see the area of the home you’ve requested! The Dream Clean is being released on Tuesday in Australia (international orders coming soon!) and I hope you love it ♥️ full article linked in my bio xx

What do you think of the final set up? ☁️🪞🎀🏹 we created a sleepover party for Mila that dreams are made of. I can’t believe our little girl is 10, where does the time go?! 🥹

#sleepoverparty #partyplanning #slumberparty #movienight #hostingtips

musicInfo.song_name: I Knew It, I Knew You

latestPosts.caption:
You’ll never lose your suitcase again with tip #6! 🌍✈️ Save this before your next trip! I’ve used Samsonite suitcases for the last 10 years as I find they’re the best quality and durability. Their new Paralux range is amazing as it comes with packing cubes that fit the suitcase perfectly, dual access opening (so you can access your stuff quickly without fully unpacking!) and even a built-in AirTag holder! Such a clever and practical design! Which tip did you not know? @samsonite_au @luxury.escapes 

#packinghacks #packwithme #traveltips #travelhacks

You’ll never lose a random pillowcase again with tip #2 🙌 which one will you try first? Hope these quick tricks were helpful lovelies xx 

#linencloset #linencupboard #tipsandtricks #hometips

Your clothes will smell incredible with tip #4 🙌 which trick will you try first? 
1. Simmer 1 sliced orange, 1 tbs coffee and vanilla to make your whole home smell incredible 
2. Place essential oil on cotton balls before vacuuming to deodorise your carpet 
3. And don’t forget to wash your cushion covers and throws fortnightly with liquid detergent to rid stale odours 
4. Place essential oil in Epsom salt in your wardrobe to help draw up moisture and freshen your clothes
5. Or you can place perfume or essential oil on furniture pads to keep your clothes smelling fresh

Hope these quick tips were helpful lovelies xx 

#tipsandtricks #homehacks #hometips #mamamilastips

You only need one pantry ingredient to make an all natural spider spray (without the harsh fumes!) 🕷️🕸️ this is one of my favourite natural spider hacks!

I’ve been using a simple salt water spray around my home, and I’ve found it helps keep spiders away. With Mila’s asthma, we try to avoid harsh aerosols where possible, so this is an easy, gentle alternative to harsh sprays that I’ve had good success with. Be mindful with use around marble and stone or any finish that doesn’t tolerate salt water. 

Have you ever tried this trick? I’d love to know if it worked for you too ♥️ 

#homehacks #spiderhack #cleaninghack #cleaningtips #mamamilastips

#3 makes the biggest difference to your hair 🙌 Fun fact, back when I was a teenager, I worked for 4 years at hairdressing salons and these are some of the tips I picked up along the way! I still use them to this day and they work so well 🙌 save this for your next salon appointment. Hope this was helpful lovelies xx hair by the lovely team at @uvasalon ♥️ 

#tipsandtricks #lifehacks #hairhack #hometips

latestPosts.caption:
Save these 5 tricks to make your next charcuterie + cheese board the best one yet 🧀 impress your guests with these simple tricks. Hope this was helpful lovelies xx

#cheeseboardtutorial #charcuterieboard #homehacks #hometips #tipsandtricks

Tip 3 is the secret to making your home smell fresh 🌻 save this video for later!
1. Remove your fly screens, wash them then wipe them with peppermint oil to repel bugs + spiders entering your home. **Use discretion before use around pets**
2. A mix of equal parts citric acid, baking soda and hot water is amazing to clear and deodorise your drains
3. And don’t forget to wash your curtains yearly to remove hidden dirt and allergens (this is so overlooked but makes a big difference!)
Hope these quick tips were helpful lovelies xx

#homehacks #hometips #homefragrance #tipsandtricks #mamamilastips
